query:
SELECT 
  pv.variantCode,
  pv.isDefault,
  mc.colorCode,
  mc.colorName,
  s.supplierName,
  c.companyName as customerName
FROM product_variants pv
LEFT JOIN material_colors mc ON pv.materialColorId = mc.id
LEFT JOIN suppliers s ON pv.supplierId = s.id
LEFT JOIN companies c ON pv.customerId = c.id
ORDER BY pv.isDefault DESC, pv.id
LIMIT 10;
